GO_DESCRIPTION_TEXT: A Group Order (GO) allows fans worldwide to bundle their purchases into a single bulk shipment. This reduces international shipping costs significantly and ensures you can secure limited items safely through CirclePort's mediation.
You do not have permission to access thi: You do not have permission to access this private project.
GO_COST_ADVANTAGE_DESC: By joining this GO, the domestic shipping cost from the creator to our Japan warehouse is shared among all participants. This significantly reduces the initial cost compared to buying individually.
INDIVIDUAL_SHIPPING_DESC: Shipped directly from our Japan warehouse to your home. While international shipping isn't shared, you benefit from near-zero 'Japan domestic shipping' via GO, and save 100% on local delivery and organizer fees.
BULK_SHIPPING_DESC: The organizer receives all items and forwards them to you. You share both Japan domestic and international shipping costs, making it the cheapest option, though local delivery and organizer fees will apply.
Note: Local delivery fees in your countr: Note: Local delivery fees and organizer handling fees are waived for this mode.

CirclePort connects global fans directly: CirclePort connects global fans directly with Japanese creators. Use Group Orders to split local shipping and consolidate your treasures into one single box.

Connecting Your Passion to Japan’s Soul: Connecting Your Passion to Japan’s Soul
CirclePort is the direct bridge from the: CirclePort is the direct bridge from the creator’s studio to your hands. We transcend distance to deliver the heart of Japan’s creativity. Whether it’s a standard order or a Group Order, your passion fuels the future of creation.
Beyond borders and oceans, your heart be: Beyond borders and oceans, your heart beats for the worlds they create. CirclePort ensures that passion arrives safe and sound. We protect, combine, and deliver your Japanese treasures—all to keep you connected to the creators you adore.

The fastest and safest shipping method. Tracking and insurance included.
Standard international express mail by t: Standard international express mail by the post office.
A cost-effective shipping method. Ideal: A cost-effective shipping method. Ideal for lightweight items.
Items can be stored free of charge for 3: Items can be stored free of charge for 30 days from arrival at the warehouse. You can wait for items from multiple creators to arrive. From the 31st day, an extension fee is charged per day.
Consolidation / Repacking: 1-3 business: Consolidation / Repacking: 1-3 business days after application
Shipping: 1-2 business days after second: Shipping: 1-2 business days after secondary payment completion
Combines multiple packages from differen: Combines multiple packages from different creators into one box. Since international shipping is determined by weight and size rather than the number of boxes, consolidating can save on shipping significantly.
Cancellations or refunds after primary p: Cancellations or refunds after primary payment are generally not accepted.
The payment deadline for secondary payme: The payment deadline for secondary payment (international shipping) is 14 days from request. Extension fees occur after the deadline.
Any customs duties or import taxes are t: Any customs duties or import taxes are the customer's responsibility (payment on delivery, etc.).
If shipping is delayed or cancelled due: If shipping is delayed or cancelled due to unforeseen circumstances by the creator, CirclePort will mediate the refund process.
Regarding damage during transit, we will: Regarding damage during transit, we will respond based on the carrier's compensation standards, comparing with the condition at inspection.
